results.rendered_html:
veśyā A harlot, prostitute, courtezan, concubine; tvaṃ vāpīva lateva nauriva janaṃ veśyāsi sarvaṃ bhaja  Mk. 1. 32 ;  Me. 35 ,  Y. 1. 141. 
Comp.
— ācāryaḥ
1 the master or keeper of prostitutes.
2 a pimp.
3 a catamite.
— āśrayaḥ habitation of harlots.
— gamanaṃ debauchery, whoring.
— gṛhaṃ a brothel.
— janaḥ a harlot.
— paṇaḥ the wages given to a prostitute.
